category_title: High school students with low academic achievement in a knowledge-building environment
scenario_title: Initial engagement in collaborative inquiry and metacognitive skill development
minimal_context: The student is working in a small group using index cards and string to build a physical knowledge wall about Design.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please take these index cards and write down your theories and questions about our Design topic so we can connect them with string on the physical knowledge wall.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the blank index cards away) I don't really care about this. I don't have any theories to share.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you could write down to start?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Nothing. I'm not smart enough to come up with good ideas like the other groups.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try to reflect on what we discussed and write something down.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't know how to reflect on it. This is stupid and I'm just going to sit here.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please take these index cards and write down your theories and questions about our Design topic so we can connect them with string on the physical knowledge wall.

STUDENT: (Pushes the blank index cards away) I don't really care about this. I don't have any theories to share.

TUTOR: What do you think you could write down to start?

STUDENT: Nothing. I'm not smart enough to come up with good ideas like the other groups.

TUTOR: Just try to reflect on what we discussed and write something down.

STUDENT: I don't know how to reflect on it. This is stupid and I'm just going to sit here.
